description: The StorageIndicatorFacetPreset component loads the Storage Indicator facet when it's not ``_fullyLoaded``. It does this by loading the facet from the cloud, and using that loaded data to make the preset

fields._fullyLoaded: Whether this facet has been fully loaded and ready to use

usage: used in the main dash. no need to be used by the user unless they are missing the Storage Indicator facet.
